text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The bright lights, glass, and signage invoke the efficiency and possibility of human ingenuity. As I move further into the R+D exhibit, I'm struck by the celebration of research and development, prompting reflection on how our creative pursuits shape not only technology but our existence. I feel both inspired and humbled, aware of the ever-present dialogue between what is known and what can still be discovered.
